response.justification: Strong general software engineer with recent entry into AI/agent infrastructure work, but lacks the required 8+ years of production AI systems experience. Missing critical AI-specific expertise: no Python proficiency despite it being a primary requirement, no vector database or RAG architecture experience, and only ~6 weeks in AI-focused work at re:cinq. While the TypeScript mastery, cloud foundation, and engineering discipline are solid assets, the core domain qualifications are not met for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Expert TypeScript/JavaScript developer with 8+ years across multiple roles; currently hands-on with AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly relevant to the position
Proven engineering leadership and mentoring: organizes technical workshops, founded open-source GIS platform used in production, advocates TDD and craftsmanship
Cloud and infrastructure foundation with AWS CDK experience, Docker, CI/CD expertise, and demonstrated ability to build and scale systems handling millions of requests
concerns: No Python experience listed despite job requirements explicitly naming it as a primary language alongside TypeScript
Career spans 20 years in general software engineering with minimal AI/ML production work; only 6 weeks in AI-focused role is insufficient to meet the 8+ years production GenAI requirement
No demonstrated knowledge of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization techniques, or multi-agent frameworks—all core technologies for this staff-level position

key_factors.factor: Current role in AI agents and MCP directly aligns with position focus
